theme: "In a world where the Olympian gods have abandoned Mount Olympus, the demigod offspring of these deities must navigate a treacherous mortal realm, where ancient prophecies are mere afterthoughts and the fabric of fate is woven with every reckless decision."
visual_concept: "A foreboding cityscape sprawls in the distance, its crumbling architecture a testament to the neglect of the gods. In the foreground, a lone figure stands atop a ruined temple, gazing out upon the ruin with an air of defeated resignation. The demigod's hair is wild and unkempt, their face a map of worry lines and scars. A wispy mist clings to the city, as if the very essence of Mount Olympus still lingers in the mortal realm."
character_context: "The demigod, Lykos, stands at the precipice of a new era, their very existence a manifestation of the Olympian's hubris. Born to the goddess Artemis and a mortal huntsman, Lykos embodies the tumultuous relationship between the gods and mortals. With the gods' abandonment, Lykos must navigate the treacherous landscape of human politics and ancient prophecies, all while struggling to define their own place in a world devoid of divine guidance."
caption_hook: When you're the only one who remembers the gods' favorite memes
post_body: and they left us with a world that's just as confusing (and probably even more confusing for them, tbh)
share_cta: Send this to your coworker who thinks they're 'fated' for success
hook_score_reason: This hook adds a modern twist on prophecy, making it relatable to everyday struggles
selection_reason: This candidate stands out because it uses relatable modern pain as a punchline, making it easy for viewers to share with friends who might be struggling with similar issues.
